chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2572 of 2017 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For hg of CMA No.12597/17 2.For hg of main case 25.03.2025. Mr. Ali Zaheer, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khursheed Javed, advocate for KDA. Ms. Saima Imdad, Assistant Advocate General. -------- MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Petitioner claims to be owner of Plot No.A-60/1, measuring 80 sq. yards, situated in Sector 11-G, North Karachi, which according to him has allegedly been occupied by respondents No. 7 and 8, who are private persons. By means of this petition, petitioner is seeking declaration to be owner of the said property and its possession. This petition is patently not maintainable as there is a dispute between the petitioner and respondents No. 7 and 8 over ownership and possession of the plot regarding which the petitioner has a remedy before the civil Court. This being the position, the petition is dismissed along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
